description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

name.jp: スライディングアッパー

description.en: Attacks an enemy and activates a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 가장 공격력이 높은 아군을 호출하여 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 사용하게 합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并呼叫攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and increases the <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> of all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nRecovers Health of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신의 턴마다 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 만큼 회복합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使自身生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s damage taken by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> while <color=#28d9ed>Eva</color> is alive.\nRecovers <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s <color=#28d9ed>Weakness Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>8</color> at the start of <color=#28d9ed>Eva</color>'s turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦場に<color=#28d9ed>【エヴァ】</color>がいる場合、<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNする。\n<color=#28d9ed>【エヴァ】</color>のターン開始時に<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>を<color=#28d9ed>8</color>回復させる。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n<color=#28d9ed>에바</color>가 살아있는 동안 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>가 받는 피해를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소시킵니다. \n<color=#28d9ed>에바</color>가 턴 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>WG</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>8</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n在<color=#28d9ed>艾娃</color>存活期间,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>所受伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。\n<color=#28d9ed>艾娃</color>在回合开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>的<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>8</color>。
